theme: Ship the Backlog — Review #13 Had Great Ideas, Let's Build Them Before Dreaming New Ones

ideas.title: Stat Card Trend Arrows — Tell Me If It's Getting Better or Worse
ideas.description: Carried from review #13. Still unimplemented. The stats bar shows counts in isolation — add ↑/↓ trend indicators comparing to previous sync. Small effort, high signal value.

ideas.title: Task Duration Color Tiers — The Stuck Worker Is Glowing Red
ideas.description: Carried from review #13. Duration-based color tiers on worker-duration element. Workers stuck for hours should visually scream.

ideas.title: Ghost Desk OOO Nameplate Badge — Make Absence Visible
ideas.description: Carried from review #13. Ghost workers need dashed borders and OOO badges. The feature exists but is invisible.

ideas.title: Manager Monitor Reactive Screen — CSS-Only Vibe Animations
ideas.description: Carried from review #13. Add pseudo-element scanlines/flicker per vibe state. Monitor already has data-vibe but only does box-shadow.

ideas.title: Keyboard Shortcut Cheat Sheet — Press ? To Discover
ideas.description: Carried from review #13. App has shortcuts (1, 2, R) but they're invisible. Add ? overlay.

notes: Review #14 focused on auditing the backlog. All 9 ideas from review #13 remain unimplemented. Recommending we ship the top 5 (2 must, 3 should) before generating new ideas. No point dreaming if we're not building.
